hero.title: Classic style,
hero.description: At Mauri Barber we take care of every detail of your haircut and beard, right in the heart of Barcelona. Book your appointment on WhatsApp and come try it out.

services.title: Everything your look needs
services.description: Haircuts, beard grooming and shaves for every style.
services.priceNote: * Reference prices, subject to confirmation with the barber.

items.name: Haircut
items.description: Scissor or clipper cut, tailored to your style.

items.name: Haircut + Beard
items.description: The full combo: haircut and beard grooming in one visit.

items.name: Beard grooming
items.description: Beard shaping and trimming with a professional finish.

items.name: Classic shave
items.description: Traditional razor shave with hot towel.

items.name: Coloring
items.description: Color and toning for hair and beard.

gallery.title: Our work
gallery.description: A look at some of our recent work.

historia.title: Mauricio, the barber
historia.paragraph: Mauricio has spent over a decade behind the chair, specializing in classic cuts and traditional razor shaves. He opened Mauri Barber to offer close, unhurried service and a craft built on attention to detail.

items.name: Ronaldo
items.text: I've been getting my hair cut by Mauricio since his previous barbershop, and I'm glad he didn't move far. He's an excellent barber with great attention to detail.

whatsapp.message: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment
